title: How can messaging apps increase user engagement through AI chatbots or interactive media? Body:
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I’m curious about strategies for boosting user engagement in messaging apps using innovative features. With so many apps competing for attention, creating experiences that keep users coming back is critical…

posts.author: jameswood32 (James Wood )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m curious about strategies for boosting user engagement in messaging apps using innovative features. With so many apps competing for attention, creating experiences that keep users coming back is critical.

Some specific points I’m interested in:

  • How can AI chatbots enhance conversations and provide meaningful interactions?

  • What types of interactive media (GIFs, polls, AR, stickers) are most effective for engagement?

  • Are there examples of messaging apps that successfully use these features to retain users?

  • How can developers implement these features without overwhelming the user or making the app too complex?

  • What role does personalization play in keeping users engaged over time?

I’d love to hear from app developers, UX designers, and tech enthusiasts: What strategies or tools have you found effective for making messaging apps more engaging?

Thanks in advance for sharing your insights!
